title: limonium confusum subsp. duriusculum
intro: Limonium confusum subsp. duriusculum, also known as sea lavender or statice, is a plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and silvery-gray leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium confusum subsp. duriusculum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
